hero.leftVertical: Changing the world, little by little, through music and stories.
hero.title: Observer

about.heading: 00. PREFACE
body: This is an unofficial fan wiki for KAMITSUBAKI STUDIO. It aims to document and organize the artists, music, projects, and storylines of Kamitsubaki for fellow "observers." All content is written and maintained by fans, and is not affiliated with KAMITSUBAKI STUDIO or THINKR.
note: LinkTh1rsty — someone who entered Kamitsubaki through KAF's voice and never really left.

In 2017, I first heard about Kamitsubaki through Guiano. I had no idea what would happen after that. Then KAF made her debut, and then came "Line"; the rhythm, the lyrics, the voice, and the feeling of being hit by something I could not explain still have not left me.

From that moment, I knew this was the place. Music, stories, stages, timelines — everything was tangled together. The deeper I went, the more it felt like this world held too much to breathe through, and the harder it became to leave.

On May 30, 2026, after KAF's "Yadosagoe" concert, I walked out of AsiaWorld-Expo into a crowd that still had not come down. Everyone was still talking, still lingering, still somewhere inside the songs. On the way back, my head was full of what had just happened, scattered and unable to stop.

That was when I remembered how it felt at the beginning: chasing scattered posts and pages, taking ages just to understand what this world looked like. I wished there had been one place where I could see the whole shape sooner. So I built this site.

Whether you are already part of KAF's or V.W.P's fan communities, or you have only just heard the name Kamitsubaki, I hope this helps you fall in a little faster. This is an unofficial observatory, not affiliated with the official studio. But if it leads you to one more song, then it was worth making.

disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan observation database.
Not affiliated with KAMITSUBAKI STUDIO or THINKR.
All official rights belong to their respective owners.

aiChat.title: AI Observer
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about Kamitsubaki, V.W.P, projects, lore...
aiChat.keyboardHint: Enter sends · Control+Enter inserts a new line
aiChat.greeting: Good evening, observer. Treat me as a Kamitsubaki Wiki guide: I can summarize this page, unpack unfamiliar names, and connect projects, artists, and lore without turning it into a support script.
aiChat.fallbackOffline: The observation line is offline. Please try again later.
aiChat.emptyResponse: Observation complete, but there is no displayable answer.
aiChat.challengeFallback: Observation frequency is too high. Please try again later.
aiChat.streamErrorFallback: The observer cannot answer right now.
quickPrompts: How does this connect to V.W.P?
aiChat.loginRequiredFallback: Anonymous observation is limited to 5 AI conversations. Sign in to continue.
aiChat.historyEmpty: Sign in and start a conversation to keep your observation history here.
aiChat.deleteThreadConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
aiChat.clearHistoryConfirm: Delete all your conversation history? This cannot be undone.
